title: Rubber Defies Lightning
description: Enel’s massive thundercloud descends toward the island, forcing everyone to face the full scale of his destruction.
scene: Across pages 14, 15, 16, 17, this scene focuses on Conis, Luffy, Enel, Nico Robin, Nami. Enel’s massive thundercloud descends toward the island, forcing everyone to face the full scale of his destruction.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Everyone's heading back to the ship!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We have to meet them there!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: You saw it too, didn't you!?

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: It was up here all along!

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: If there really was gold or not...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: This was a personal fight between me,

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: So I'm gonna stay up here!

summary: Enel’s massive thundercloud descends toward the island, forcing everyone to face the full scale of his destruction.
